section.heading: Codes for Civil Service Classes
section.text: The codes listed in the following pages are explained below.

para.name: representation-codes
para.heading: REPRESENTATION CODES
para.text: The following codes indicate which, if any, labor union or professional group represents employees in a particular job classification.

para.name: flsa-codes
para.heading: FLSA CODES
para.text: The column labeled "FLSA Code" is used to indicate the Fair Labor Standards Act status of a particular job class. The explanation of the codes is as follows:
N - Covered by FLSA (Non-Exempt) A - Exempt from FLSA (Administrative)

para.name: eeoc-codes
para.heading: EEOC CODES
para.text: The following Equal Employment Opportunity Compliance codes indicate how Civil Service classifications are categorized:
X - N.E.C. (Not Elsewhere Classified)-Used to designate certain elected and appointed individuals
